title: Universal Legal advises CloudSEK on partial exit of early investor with 13x returns
description: CloudSEK Research Pte Ltd has facilitated a partial exit of their first institutional investor Exfinity Venture Partners by delivering a 13x multiple on invested capital and an internal rate of return of more than 40%, through a secondary sale to existing investors.Universal Legal advised CloudSEK on this transaction.The transaction team consisted of Rashi Kapoor Mehta (Partner) and Neelkamal Chaudhary (Associate Partner).CloudSEKCloudSEK is an AI-native predictive cyber intelligence platform th
